<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Comparison summary request (light exposure, workspace suitability, amenity highlights) – no template field for custom analytical summaries', 'Detailed amenities like gym, rooftop terrace, co-working lounge, concierge, art gallery – no amenities field in property_listings', 'Neighborhoods such as Financial District, Liberty Village, Leslieville – not in allowed location_neighborhood values', 'Year Built / Year Renovated – no field for construction or renovation year', 'Mortgage details such as loan-to-value (LTV), monthly payment, repayment flexibility – not present in financing_options', 'Optional add-ons like expedited (rush) legal service or international buyer support – not in service_packages or financing_options']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "13, ['Condo property listings with price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, and condo fees', 'Property type: condo', 'Layout type: open_concept or loft_style', 'Location region: urban / downtown / residential', 'Building age (mapped to building_age)', 'Virtual tour availability and viewing scheduling (viewing_coordination)', 'Financing options with down payment, interest rate, mortgage term, and closing costs (financing_options)', 'Legal service packages with cost and service_level', 'Property survey and status certificate costs (survey_costs in total_package_summary)', 'Property taxes and registration fees (property_taxes_annual field)', 'Moving services with cost, service level, and white_glove option (moving_services)', 'Utility setup packages with cost and services_included (utility_services)', 'Total cost estimation and package summary (total_package_summary)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 6, ['Comparison summary request (light exposure, workspace suitability, amenity highlights) – no template field for custom analytical summaries', 'Detailed amenities like gym, rooftop terrace, co-working lounge, concierge, art gallery – no amenities field in property_listings', 'Neighborhoods such as Financial District, Liberty Village, Leslieville – not in allowed location_neighborhood values', 'Year Built / Year Renovated – no field for construction or renovation year', 'Mortgage details such as loan-to-value (LTV), monthly payment, repayment flexibility – not present in financing_options', 'Optional add-ons like expedited (rush) legal service or international buyer support – not in service_packages or financing_options']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 13, ['Condo property listings with price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, and condo fees', 'Property type: condo', 'Layout type: open_concept or loft_style', 'Location region: urban / downtown / residential', 'Building age (mapped to building_age)', 'Virtual tour availability and viewing scheduling (viewing_coordination)', 'Financing options with down payment, interest rate, mortgage term, and closing costs (financing_options)', 'Legal service packages with cost and service_level', 'Property survey and status certificate costs (survey_costs in total_package_summary)', 'Property taxes and registration fees (property_taxes_annual field)', 'Moving services with cost, service level, and white_glove option (moving_services)', 'Utility setup packages with cost and services_included (utility_services)', 'Total cost estimation and package summary (total_package_summary)']
